summary: Be Heard backend regression: 9/9 pytest tests passed (100%). Validated new POST /api/transcribe (real WAV via espeak-ng+ffmpeg returns non-empty Whisper text; empty file -> 400; >24MB -> 400), new GET /api/stats (fresh user zeroed, my_cases=1/my_in_progress=1 after creating a case, all int fields present), and full case flow regression (create -> r1 submit/confirm-mirror for a & b -> r2 submit a/b -> r3 submit a/b -> resolved with a_verdict & b_verdict pills in {Proportionate, Heightened}). Edge cases (wrong-stage submit -> 400, unknown case -> 404) also pass.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 on creation. Functional but inconsistent with REST conventions (delete also returns 200 with deleted_count rather than 204).
On internal Whisper error the endpoint returns 500 with the raw exception string in 'detail' (server.py:610). Acceptable for MVP, but consider sanitising error messages before production.

action_items: (Optional, minor) Use HTTP 201 for POST /api/cases and /api/profile creates to follow REST conventions.
(Optional) Sanitise the upstream error message bubbled up from POST /api/transcribe 500 path so we don't leak provider error strings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 629 lines, approaching the 700-line threshold. Consider splitting LLM helpers, models, and routes into separate modules once it grows further.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, MONGO_URL, DB_NAME are read at import time via os.environ[...] which fails fast - good. No hardcoded URLs detected.
_strip_id helper exists but isn't actually used; all queries already pass {'_id': 0} projection - safe pattern.
OpenAISpeechToText client is created lazily and cached in module-global _stt_client - reasonable for serverless-like reloads.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Test cases use ephemeral TEST_user_<uuid> user_ids and self-clean via DELETE /api/cases/{id} in finalizers. One spoken WAV fixture synthesized at /tmp/fixtures/speech.wav via espeak-ng + ffmpeg (16kHz mono).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is healthy. Next agent should focus on FRONTEND (Expo web preview at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL): Home title + motivational stat, Past Cases screen, Stats screen, voice-to-text mic on TextInputs. Note: frontend env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). pytest suite is at /app/backend/tests/ - reuse for regression. Backend /api/transcribe requires multipart field name 'file'. Audio recording in Expo Go web preview may not work for real mic capture - test by mocking or by checking the mic button's UI states only.
rca_of_issue: No bugs to RCA - all endpoints healthy.
